AND ROBERT GROSSMAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 27, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE DEFENDANTS THE OPPORTUNITY TO FILE A SUBSTANTIVE REPLY TO PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION. DEFENDANTS STATE IN THEIR REPLY BRIEF THAT THEY HAVE NOT RECEIVED PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION BRIEF. PLAINTIFF SHALL RE-SERVE THE OPPOSITION BRIEF BY OCTOBER 10, 2014 OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. DEFENDANTS MAY FILE AND SERVE THEIR SUBSTANTIVE REPLY BRIEF UP TO FIVE DAYS BEFORE THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.(302/EHG)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Zachary S. Tolson, Esq. of Goodman Neuman Hamilton, (415-705-0400), for Gary Grossman, Defendant and moving party.
No other appearance.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT GARY GROSSMAN, BOB GROSSMAN, LERER BROTHERS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, and ROBERT GROSSMAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend for the reasons asserted in the demurrer, i.e. statute of limitations and failure to disclose the claims in bankruptcy proceedings. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Continued To Oct-27-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANTS GARY GROSSMAN, BOB GROSSMAN, LERER BROTHERS, INC. and ROBERT GROSSMAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to October 27, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give Defendants the opportunity to file a substantive reply to Plaintiff's opposition. Defendants state in their reply brief that they have not received Plaintiff's opposition brief. Plaintiff shall re-serve the opposition brief by October 10, 2014 or the motion will be granted. Defendants may file and serve their substantive reply brief up to five days before the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
